headline: Erste Group Sees Profit Growth Ahead, Upgrades Verizon (VZ) to Buy
summary: Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ) is included among the 15 Cheapest Stocks with Highest Dividends. On April 2, Erste Group upgraded Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ) to Buy from Hold. The analyst said Verizon’s profitability is “significantly higher than that of most of its competitors” and expects operating profit to increase over the next two years. On […]
